Klasse PluginHandle<A>

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.internal.PluginHandle<A>
Typparameter:
A - the type of the plugin contract
public final class PluginHandle<A> extends Object

Encapsulates all resources and metadata associated with a loaded plugin.

A PluginHandle holds the plugin's metadata, its dedicated class loader, and the factory used for instantiating it. This class is immutable.

Seit:
1.0.0

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

  • Methodendetails

    • pluginHandle

      public static <A> PluginHandle<A> pluginHandle(@NonNull PluginMetaData metaData, @NonNull StreamClassLoader classLoader, @NonNull PluginFactory<A> factory)

      Creates a new PluginHandle instance.

      Typparameter:
      A - the type of the plugin contract
      Parameter:
      metaData - the plugin's metadata; must not be null
      classLoader - the class loader used for the plugin; must not be null
      factory - the factory for creating plugin instances; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a new PluginHandle instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if any parameter is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getMetaData

      public @NonNull PluginMetaData getMetaData()

      Returns the plugin's metadata.

      Gibt zurück:
      the metadata
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getClassLoader

      public @NonNull StreamClassLoader getClassLoader()

      Returns the class loader used for the plugin.

      Gibt zurück:
      the class loader
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getFactory

      public @NonNull PluginFactory<A> getFactory()

      Returns the factory for creating plugin instances.

      Gibt zurück:
      the factory
      Seit:
      1.0.0
